title: Claude OS human approval ledger entry
description: One JSON object per line in logs/approval-log.jsonl (append-only).

timestamp.description: RFC 3339 / ISO-8601 instant in UTC when the approval was recorded.

operation.description: Short name of the steward operation (e.g. release tag, migration cutover).

approver.description: Human approver identity or placeholder until sign-off is captured (e.g. pending:release-owner).

scope.description: Repos, environments, tickets, or blast-radius boundary covered by the approval.

commandOrActionApproved.description: Exact command, deploy step, or destructive action that was approved.

expirationOrUse.description: Either a wall-clock expiry, a one-time-use flag, or both.

expiresAt.description: RFC 3339 instant after which the approval must not be reused.

oneTimeUse.description: When true, the approval applies to a single execution only.

relatedValidationEvidence.description: Pointers to envelopes, CI URLs, commit SHAs, or redacted command transcripts.

rollbackPlanReference.description: Path or doc id for rollback (e.g. playbooks/release.md, ticket URL, runbook section).
